content.text:
<user_query>
Find the most current BIQc value proposition and product messaging in this codebase (especially website pages and hero sections). Look for text that explains what BIQc does, outcomes, integrations, and differentiators. Return top 5-8 canonical statements with file paths.
</user_query>
Searching the codebase for BIQc messaging, hero copy, and related marketing content.
Reading primary website pages and hero components for canonical copy.

Here are **canonical BIQc value-prop and product messages** drawn from the live marketing site (`/` maps to `HomePage.js` in `App.js`). The mockup HTML under `mockups/` is older/alternate creative and is **not** treated as the current product source of truth.

---

### 1. Primary homepage hero (headline + what BIQc is)
**Statements:** “One intelligence layer for every **decision that matters**.” — “BIQc brings your business systems into one **live Intelligence Platform**. Helping owners and leaders make faster decisions, evaluate trade-offs clearly, and execute with confidence in realtime.”  
**File:** `C:\Users\andre\.cursor\worktrees\tpn\hrx\frontend\src\pages\website\HomePage.js` (hero `h1` + lead paragraph)

---

### 2. Mechanism / pipeline (“how it works” above the fold)
**Statement:** “BIQc pulls **live signal** from every system, runs **continuous watchtower** checks, and turns complexity into **clear boardroom actions**.”  
**File:** `C:\Users\andre\.cursor\worktrees\tpn\hrx\frontend\src\pages\website\HomePage.js` (“How it all works” section)

---

### 3. Positioning: Cognition-as-a-Service + SMB vs enterprise
**Statements:** Eyebrow “What **Cognition-as-a-Service** Delivers” — “**Enterprise-grade intelligence. SMB-sized investment.**” — Supporting line: “Businesses embedding **AI-driven decision systems** experience:”  
**File:** `C:\Users\andre\.cursor\worktrees\tpn\hrx\frontend\src\pages\website\HomePage.js` (`data-testid="cognition-section"`)

---

### 4. Platform page: problem/solution + six-layer story
**Statements:** “Run Your Business With **Enterprise-Level Intelligence** — **Without Hiring Enterprise Headcount**.” — “BIQc **connects your systems**, builds **unified business context**, and deploys **autonomous agents** that **monitor, detect, and correct** — before problems compound.” — Section “**Six layers of autonomous intelligence**” with connect → context → monitor → flag → recommend → automate.  
**File:** `C:\Users\andre\.cursor\worktrees\tpn\hrx\frontend\src\pages\website\PlatformPage.js` (hero + “What BIQc Does”)

---

### 5. Intelligence engine: outcomes (proactive vs reactive)
**Statements:** “**Stop Checking Reports. Start Preventing Problems.**” — “BIQc **doesn't wait for you to ask**. It monitors **every data signal** across your business and surfaces what matters — **before it becomes a problem**.”  
**File:** `C:\Users\andre\.cursor\worktrees\tpn\hrx\frontend\src\pages\website\IntelligencePage.js` (hero)

---

### 6. Integrations: breadth + trust model
**Statements:** “**500+ Integrations**” — “**Connects to the tools your business already uses.**” — “Connect your **CRM, accounting, email and HR** tools to give BIQc the full picture. All data is **Australian-hosted**, **encrypted at rest**, and **read-only** — you can revoke access at any time.”  
**File:** `C:\Users\andre\.cursor\worktrees\tpn\hrx\frontend\src\pages\website\IntegrationsPage.js` (integrations hero)

---

### 7. Homepage integrations strip (stack + product tie-in)
**Statements:** “**One connection layer** across your operating stack.” — “BIQc **ingests signal** from finance, sales, operations, and communication tools so **Soundboard** can reason on **live evidence**.”  
**File:** `C:\Users\andre\.cursor\worktrees\tpn\hrx\frontend\src\components\website\ModernIntegrationBanner.js`

---

### 8. Hero right-rail SMB narrative (step-by-step value prop)
**Statements (numbered lines in UI):** (1) Connect finance, sales, operations, and communication tools once. (2) BIQc **continuously monitors** performance, risk, and market change. (3) BIQc converts live signals into **leadership-grade intelligence and insights**. (4) You and your team get **clear priorities, decisions, and next actions** in real time.  
**File:** `C:\Users\andre\.cursor\worktrees\tpn\hrx\frontend\src\components\website\HeroExperienceTabs.js` (`SMB_SUMMARY_LINES`)

---

**Honorable mentions** (also current site copy): **Pricing** hero — “Multiply the Capability of Your Entire Team” and leadership-focused outcomes (`C:\Users\andre\.cursor\worktrees\tpn\hrx\frontend\src\pages\website\PricingPage.js`); **Trust** — “Built for Businesses That Take Data Seriously” + “Australian sovereign hosting. Enterprise-grade security.” (`C:\Users\andre\.cursor\worktrees\tpn\hrx\frontend\src\pages\website\TrustLandingPage.js`).
